TASK-0001.title: Replace enquirer with @inquirer/prompts
TASK-0001.notes: enquirer has ESM/CJS mismatch on Node 18+. @inquirer/prompts is ESM native and maintained by the Inquirer team.

TASK-0002.title: Implement PAT token auth flow in sync.js
TASK-0002.notes: Store PAT in ~/.workbenchrc. First run prompts for token, stores it. Subsequent runs use stored token. Never commit to repo.

TASK-0003.title: Implement workbench bootstrap command
TASK-0003.notes: Reads STATE_VECTOR.json in cwd, outputs a formatted copy-paste-ready prompt block with all 3 raw GitHub URLs pre-filled. This is the core value prop.

TASK-0004.title: Implement ~/.workbenchrc config storage
TASK-0004.notes: Key-value store for github_token, github_username, default_repo. Used by sync and bootstrap. Never committed.

TASK-0005.title: End-to-end test npm package from clean install
TASK-0005.notes: Run: npm install -g workbench-ai in a fresh temp folder. Test all 4 commands. Document every failure.

TASK-0006.title: Port all fixes to Python package
TASK-0006.notes: Python CLI must be functionally identical. Port fixes from npm after npm is verified working.

TASK-0007.title: End-to-end test Python package from clean install
TASK-0007.notes: pip install workbench-ai in fresh venv. Test all 4 commands.

TASK-0008.title: Add workbench doctor command
TASK-0008.notes: Checks: git installed, git config user.name/email set, GitHub token valid, schema valid, Node/Python version. Outputs pass/fail per check.

TASK-0009.title: Improve error handling UX across all commands
TASK-0009.notes: No raw stack traces. Every error should output: what went wrong, why, and exactly what to do next.

TASK-0010.title: Test and fix GitHub Action
TASK-0010.notes: Add .github/workflows/workbench-sync.yml to a test repo and verify it runs correctly on push.

TASK-0011.title: Test and fix install.sh and install.ps1
TASK-0011.notes: Run on clean machine. Fix any path or permission issues.

TASK-0012.title: Publish v0.2.0 to npm and PyPI
TASK-0012.notes: After TASK-0001 through TASK-0009 are complete. Bump version, update changelog, publish both packages.

next_session_prompt:
Fetch these URLs and start the workbench-ai project:
